name: Camp Verde Community Center Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Camp Verde Community Center Gym in Camp Verde, AZ! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Chino Valley Community Center
description:
Restrooms are three, permanent porta-potties.
Lines are within basketball court fencing that is much larger than pb courts, so bring plenty of balls or be ready to spend extra time retrieving out balls.
A local non-profit club, Chino Valley Pickleball Association, provides access to nets, balls, and members to play with if you don't have your own nets.

name: Copper Penny Park
description: Copper Penny Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarkdale, AZ. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court.

description: Cottonwood Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Cottonwood, AZ. There are 14 asphalt courts. 12 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Espire Sports
description: Come play pickleball at Espire Sports in Prescott, AZ! There are 20 acrylic courts. 6 are outdoors and 14 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.
